<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check magenta squares after clicking
seg = current_frame.segmentation

print(f"Magenta squares: {len(magenta)}")
for n in sorted(magenta, key=lambda x: x['boundary'][0][1]):
    print(f"  col={n['boundary'][0][1]}, row={n['boundary'][0][0]}")

# The magenta square at [55, 14] should have moved to [54, 13]
# Let me check if it's there
if any(n['boundary'][0] == [54, 13] for n in magenta):
    print("Magenta square moved to [54, 13]")
else:
    print("Magenta square did not move as expected")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
